temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, confined space, a man in a black shirt, sweating profusely, leans over another man who is slumped over, seemingly unconscious. The man in black grabs a crumpled piece of paper from the other's jacket pocket, his expression intense and determined. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation. One character is interrogating another, who is incapacitated. The discovery of the paper in the pocket suggests it's a key piece of evidence or a clue to the situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Aggressive, threatening. 2) Background sounds or music: Tense, low-volume ambient sound.)
(00:04-00:07) The man who was interrogated, now looking terrified, gasps for air and pleads with the man in black. He frantically denies being the mole, his face filled with fear and desperation. (Storyline: The accused character vehemently denies his involvement, escalating the tension and mystery. His fear suggests he is either innocent or a very convincing actor.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, desperate, pleading. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense ambient sound continues.)
